rss_7119533798.title: Trump nominates former Oklahoma state trooper to head ICE
rss_7119533798.hint: President Trump nominated Lance Schroyer, a former Oklahoma state trooper, to direct Immigration and Customs Enforcement. The agency hasn't had a Senate-confirmed director since the Obama administration.
